entities.name: CAJANUS PLATYCARPUS
entities.description: A wild species of pigeonpea used for the improvement of cultivated pigeonpea)

entities.name: HYBRIDIZATION
entities.description: The process of producing offspring from two different species or varieties)

entities.name: POST-ZYGOTIC BARRIERS
entities.description: Biological barriers that occur after fertilization preventing the development of viable hybrids)

entities.name: EMBRYO RESCUE TECHNIQUES
entities.description: Techniques used to save hybrid embryos that would otherwise abort)

entities.name: MORPHOLOGICAL STUDIES
entities.description: Analysis of the physical form and structure of the plants to confirm hybrid nature)

entities.name: CYTOLOGICAL STUDIES
entities.description: Analysis of the cellular components and chromosomes to confirm hybrid nature)

entities.name: ESTERASE ISOZYME BAND PATTERN
entities.description: Biochemical analysis used to confirm the hybrid nature of plants)

entities.name: POLLEN STERILITY
entities.description: The inability of pollen to fertilize an egg, observed in F1 hybrids)

entities.name: MEIOTIC STUDIES
entities.description: Studies of the cell division process to determine the cause of pollen sterility)
